trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

trending_videos.title: Dr. STONE x Crunchyroll Anime Island | Official Fortnite Watch Party Launch Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Join Crunchyroll Anime Island in Fortnite for a special limited-time Dr. STONE event featuring exclusive content, creator insights, iconic inventions from the series, interactive challenges, rewards, and more.

Celebrate Dr. STONE with fellow fans before the finale premieres on Crunchyroll June 25.

Available June 19–21 only.

Join now on Fortnite
Island Code: 6044-5327-4490  

ABOUT DR. STONE x CRUNCHYROLL ANIME ISLAND

Experience a special limited-time Dr. STONE event on the new Crunchyroll Island in Fortnite ahead of the finale premiering on Crunchyroll on June 25. Watch exclusive Dr. STONE content, including creator insights, featured inventions from the series and first episode from the latest season. Explore iconic recreations from Dr. STONE like the ramen cart, Steam Gorilla, and Perseus, capture memorable moments with friends, compete on the leaderboards in science-themed challenges, battle with exclusive Crunchyroll-themed weapons, and collect rewards throughout the island.

D

MAPPA CHANNEL.impact: High interest in anime trailers and PVs as evidenced by Chainsaw Man.

MadMorph.impact: Niche viewership with creative builds in gaming.

New Rockstars.impact: In-depth analysis of popular franchises attracts detailed-oriented audience.

general_trends.multi-genre engagement: Channels crossing into multiple genres like gaming and anime are popular.
general_trends.trailer-centric content: High demand for new releases, teasers, and spoiler content.

cross-genre content.opportunity: Develop content that merges popular genres such as anime and gaming to capture wide audience interests.
cross-genre content.suggestion: Create collaborative content between anime creators and gaming influencers.

detailed analysis content.opportunity: Expand detailed content analysis in untapped or emerging shows and games.
detailed analysis content.suggestion: Encourage creators to delve into niche aspects of popular franchises.

unique experience content.opportunity: Capitalize on unique and creative experiences within gaming and lifestyle content.
unique experience content.suggestion: Develop series that blend lifestyle with gaming or entertainment, focusing on unique challenges or builds.

potential_viewership_insights.high_engagement_trailers: Content related to trailers and teasers tends to attract more viewers, highlighting a significant market interest in upcoming releases.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
